---
name: Example request
about: Request a new business scenario or visual example
title: "Example request: "
---

## Scenario

What business situation should the skill support?

Examples: SaaS board update, AI vendor benchmark, investment memo, market entry, cost transformation.

## Input Data

Paste anonymized notes, metrics, or constraints.

## Desired Output

- [ ] Slide spec
- [ ] Review-loop example
- [ ] README visual
- [ ] Rendered PPTX/PDF/HTML example

## Why This Matters

Who would use this example, and what decision should it support?

## Notes
